entry.title: Re: EDI MESSAGES FOR SUPPLIER CONNECTION

entry.title: Re: Automatic OP clearing when using an alternative payer
entry.content: Dear Colleague, I hope you find yourself well! Thank you for joining the community. As soon as possible, a technical expert will contact you to clarify your question. I am adjusting the tags to redirect the issue to the right team. Best Regards, Erick Goulardt SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Behavior validation messages are not displayed
entry.content:
The code shown worked for me on a SAP BTP ABAP Environment system (latest release 2502).

I had however to perform a few changes because when using cut and paste syntax errors were shown.

1. Not sure why we see a "slash" here:

READ ENTITIES OF /zi_product IN LOCAL MODE

2. In the BDEF in the validation statement a semicolon is missing

validation validateMandatoryFields on save { field ProductName create; }

must read

validation validateMandatoryFields on save { field ProductName; create; }

And I saw

 

Question: 
You have not mentioned on which release you are working ?

entry.title: Re: End to End Designing the Multilevel Hierarchy in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Kartheek,

finally I copied the relevant CDS view and applied the changes explained in note 3208160 for the CDS annotations "Consumption.filter.mandatory Boolean (true, false)".

And it worked as desired.

It is quite likely that the issue is caused by the S/4 version we are using at the moment. I did not want to apply patches in S/4 because we start an upgrade soon.

Thank you very much for your blog.

Br.,

DirkO

entry.title: Re: Reverse Tax Engine - Payroll USA
entry.content:
Thanks for the reply @Matt_Fraser!

Just hoping anyone who does have MA would respond so we confirm if we missed something in our config.  We didn't see any issues until MA changed their tax tables for the surtax and it only popped up with our 2025 payrolls.

entry.title: Re: Single Cycle Plan
entry.content:
Hello @Cdixon40 ,

here you go:

1. When creating a single cycle plan is there an option to pick a strategy?: No, it is not possible. You have to create a strategy plan. 

2. Is difference between a single Cycle plan and a Quality plan?: Quality plan is used to trigger tasks which are used to inspect a material while GR, GI and various goods movements. On the other hand Single cycle plan is used to do time based or performance based maintenance of equipment. Quality plan is not created for equipment. 

3. What is single cycle plan mostly used for? Single cycle plan is used for time based or performance based maintenance. For ex: Monthly maintenance of a motor, maintenance after 10000 km od distance travelled by a vehicle or 5000 hr of running hours.

Let me know if you need information.

Vaibhav Mishra

entry.title: Controlling Sales to Blocked Customer in SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hi SAP SD Experts,

In SAP (ECC), we have one customer (SH) with two different SAP numbers and are selling to them from two different entities. The problem is that I have blocked one customer number in entity one, but the other entity is still selling to the same customer, even though they are blocked, due to the different SAP number. How can I control this scenario?

Say - A -Customer 

Company code -TR10-(Customer number is 0001 For customer A)

Company code-PL10 (Customer number is 0002 For customer A)

If blocked customer A(001) in CC TR10, system allowed me to sale to customer 0002 from CC PL10 due to different SAP number.

And not possible to extend the customer from TR10 TO PL10 Receiving error below

entry.title: Re: Consuming External Service Onpremise in SAP CAP using Principal Propagantion
entry.content:
Hi @devangelgb,

I have tried same scenario using capm to connect onpremise.. 
My destination is using the authentication "principal propagation".
I am facing the same error; I have used destination and connectivity service and bound to application.

If you able to solve this. Please help me on this. Thank you

entry.title: Re: Identity and Access Management with Microsoft Entra, Part I: Managing access to SAP BTP
entry.content: @MartinRaepple @H_Ettelbrueck Hi, trying to set up a new IAS tenant with OIDC integration with Entra ID following this blog.  In IAS Admin Console, Application > System Applications > Administration Console shows "Protocol Type: SAML2.0".    How to change it to OIDC?

entry.title: Re: Steps to install an ADD-ON using SAINT
entry.content: Transaction SAINT main advantage against importing 3rd party transport is: As of Version 0053 of the SAP Add-On Installation Tool, not only can you install ABAP add-ons, but you can also uninstall them again -> https://me.sap.com/notes/2011192

entry.title: Re: iOS native app - Offline OData DataFormat
entry.content: Are you using MDK or building a Native iOS App using the BTP SDK for iOS?

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Mobile Services Native/MDK App Authorization...
entry.content: MDK currently only supports OAuth2 for it's authentication mechanism.  We do not support an anonymous user connection.  Authentication is handled by the IdP configured in BTP so you can utilize an IdP either through IAS or another that would handle the authentication.

entry.title: Re: how to change Length of G/L Account Number in custom...
entry.content:
Extend the view and adjust the GLAccount field length in your extended view.

Either use Cast or ltrim or by using a custom data element.

entry.title: Re: How to pass dynamic value through a mdk Extension code
entry.content:
If you are already in extension code, couldn't the extension just directly invoke the document editor extension?

In terms of "passing data", normally you pass data into the extension via the Extension Properties.  Controls don't normally pass data back to anything.  They may expose a getValue() method so that an action like create entity can grab a value from the extension to save into a backend transaction (offline or online). 

From your description you will have to determine how you want to handle the scenario.  Since document sizes can vary widely you may want to look at writing a temp file to the app sandbox Documents or temp directory.  You could also consider using AppClientData to pass something as well.

Hope this helps

entry.title: Re: Convert DMS Folder ID to Name in Automation
entry.content: Thanks Dan.  That worked for me.  Appreciate your help.

entry.title: Re: Cross xsa application (node modules) access
entry.content: a few years ago, i was trying the same thing, no luck, ended up binding all the app to the same uaa as workaround.

entry.title: Re: Automatically nudge sending for onboardee
entry.content: Hello! I have the same problem. Were you able to find a solution? Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Call for Speakers (SIT DFW) - spring 2025
entry.content: For my part, I'd be happy to talk on any one of a range of topics:  Internal experimental use of Agents and LLMs inside SAP Community, tips on running LLMs locally, or a review of the 2025 SAP Developer Survey Results.

  2. Like to see the program code

entry.title: Re: Responsibility Management: Create Your Rules (5/5)

entry.title: Re: The fastest way to a deployable CAP app on SAP BTP Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
@daniel_schlachter 

Thank you for your reply. I have updated the cds-dk and now, the global version is 8.7.2.

I've learned that the leading slashes are removed during the build if the following parameter is specified in mta.yaml:

parameters:
  deploy_mode: html5-repo

Although the parameter is there, the manifest.json in the dist folder still contains a leading slash.

entry.title: Re: The fastest way to a deployable CAP app on SAP BTP Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
@Willem_Pardaens 
Thank you for your comment. I have tried `cds-ts add workzone`, but it didn't add the transpile task either. Additionally, it produced the following error during the build:

Error: app/booksui3/webapp/Component.ts(1,27): error TS2307: Cannot find module 'sap/fe/core/AppComponent' or its corresponding type declarations.

I have yet to identify whether this is caused by `cds add typescript` or `cds-ts add workzone`.

entry.title: Re: How to create Fiori Catalog, Group and custom Fiori tiles
entry.content: Nice blog, Whatever technical feasible has been posted so i wont demoralize you but technical roadmap and guidance from SAP to be included in your blog. Good Job, Keep it up!!

entry.title: Re: SAP Identity Authentication vs. Local Identity Direct...
entry.content:
Besides the differences in my other post, I realized a different one, an important one.

The IAS-one can be used to connect to other systems, like when keeping two IAS's in sync.
Whereas the Local Identity Directory can only be 'itself'.

entry.title: Re: Add SAP GUI Transaction in Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Hi Micael, How about nwbc (Business Client related) links in SAP Fiori?

Regards,

Vaibhav

entry.title: Re: SAP Companion - Show Bubble as Callout
entry.content: I've had the same issue. Was very excited for this but they do not show unless the users clicks ? and opens the Companion Carousel.

entry.title: Re: CL_SALV_TABLE Hide empty rows
entry.content:
Hi Luis,
you can use filters:

DATA: o_alv TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table.
 ... 
DATA: lcl_filters TYPE REF TO cl_salv_filters.
 
TRY.
    lcl_filters = o_alv->get_filters( ).
    " gesetzten Filter der Spalte 'CARRID' entfernen
    lcl_filters->remove_filter( 'CARRID' ).
    " neuen Filter für Spalte 'CARRID' setzen
    lcl_filters->add_filter( columnname = 'CARRID'
                             sign = 'I'
                             option = 'EQ'
                             low = 'AA' ).
  CATCH cx_salv_existing
        cx_salv_data_error
        cx_salv_not_found.
ENDTRY.



SAP Help 

https://codezentrale.de/abap-salv-table-filter-benutzen/

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Stories issue: Codes appearing in dime...
entry.content: Hi Olga, thanks for your reply. We did see this when making a query change, and would fix it accordingly. However, our customer is indicating that it is happening without them changing the query, which could mean that the underlying objects are changing. Thanks for your insight!

entry.title: Re: Sales Order OData V4 doesn't return the characteristi...
entry.content:
Thanks Dequan,

The value was stored in VarCnfCharcFromDate, so the logic of this API is that for each type of data we have a field that contains the value specifically for that type (VarCnfCharcFromAmount, VarCnfCharcFromQuantity, VarCnfCharcFromNumericValue...).

entry.title: Re: SNC Error Specified target is unknown or unreac target
entry.content: Hello, did you find the solution to this? we are facing the same after upgrading our computers from windows 10 to windows11

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking Integration Considerations for 3rd party clock vendors
entry.content: Interested to learn if there is a list of SAP preferred physical clock terminal vendors based in the US who are certified with integration/extension that is compatible with SuccessFactors Time Tracking CICO.

entry.title: Web Assistant / SAP Companion Lightbox Quick Tour settings
entry.content:
The standard SAP Enable Now content offers a Quick Tour template which can be downloaded from the SAP Enable Now Info Centre SAP Enable Now Info Center
We have a test environment linked to the standard content so I can see the Quick Tour working from the homepage.  It is a Link Tile in Web Assistant with the selection to open in Lightbox and the book (which is the template) opens in the lightbox window.

here is the Quick Tour and here it is when you launch it

You can see that the book is opening within the lightbox and the user can click on the headings to see the different pages in the book. 

The settings for this in Web Assistant are:

I have recreated this Link Tile in our content (even using the template) however the quick tour opens in a new window NOT in the Lightbox window.

To demonstrate the issue, I have made the lightbox much larger than the content, but you can see that trainer is open with a specific size, then the quick tour is within the trainer but it is not sitting in the lightbox window, it is a new window which has opened.

I have tried a number of settings in the trainer, the book page defaults, etc. I have resized the windows but I can't get the book to launch in the lightbox pop up.

the standard content URL is

https://education.hana.ondemand.com/education/pub/qt/index.html?show=book!BO_682A7A1E140C49BF

our URL IS

https://#########.enable-now.cloud.sap/pub/c0a9d2736/index.html?show=book!BO_10D7A77C7ED286B0

I can't see the Resources setting which the standard content is using to compare to what we have configured, but I have tried a number of different settings to try to get this to work.

And changing these Book Reader or Trainer settings will affect all the content, some of which you want to maximise etc.  

The issue is the content should not open in the trainer window, and it shouldn't be using it, but it is.

any idea..?

entry.title: Re: February's Developer Challenge in SAP Community - Integration 🧩
entry.content: Finally escaped 🙂 This was tougher for me than UI5. Great questions and good learning.  Thanks @ajmaradiaga !!

entry.title: IBP transporting changes
entry.content:
Hello All , 

Couple of basic questions about transporting changes from IBP dev to prod environment 

1. Should we create an OSS note to create a transport route everytime a planning area related change has to be moved from dev to prod or is it a one time activity ? 

2. For non- planning area related changes in IBP , how do we transport changes ? The same export software collection and import in target ? 

Please advice 

Thanks

Aparna

entry.title: Re: Proactive maintenance & Reactive maintenance
entry.content: Thank you for the blog. I'm an old SAP PM guy and to me it sounds like SAP just dressed up the ECC version with S4 HANA and no functionality has been changed. Proactive is preventive maintenance and Reactive is breakdown maintenance. The only new functionality has been added in SAP EAM is SAP IAM with advance technologies like IOT and AI involves AIN, PDS and ASPM but never seen a process flow in FIORI for these functions yet.

entry.title: Error returning creation data in RAP managed with save unmanaged
entry.content:
Hey guys

I'm building a study project with RAP, but I stopped at one point and can't move forward. I'm using the managed scenario with unmanaged save.

The screen is a normal screen without any changes.

When clicking save, it executes my save_modified method.

  METHOD save_modified.

    DATA: lv_msg_error TYPE string,
          lv_bookid    TYPE sbook-bookid.

    IF create-marcacaovoo[] IS NOT INITIAL.

      DATA: ls_sbook TYPE sbook.

      READ TABLE create-marcacaovoo INTO DATA(ls_voo) INDEX 1.

      ls_sbook-carrid    = ls_voo-carrid.
      ls_sbook-connid    = ls_voo-connid.
      ls_sbook-fldate    = ls_voo-fldate.
      ls_sbook-customid  = ls_voo-customid.
      ls_sbook-agencynum = ls_voo-agencynum.
      ls_sbook-class     = ls_voo-class.

      CALL FUNCTION 'ZFH_MF_MARCAR_VOO'
        STARTING NEW TASK 'UPDATE'
        EXPORTING
          is_voo = ls_sbook.

      WAIT UP TO 1 SECONDS.

      SELECT SINGLE message
       FROM zfh_t_log
       INTO lv_msg_error
       WHERE carrid = ls_sbook-carrid
       AND   connid = ls_sbook-connid
       AND   fldate = ls_sbook-fldate
       AND   customid = ls_sbook-customid
       AND   data = sy-datum.

      IF lv_msg_error IS NOT INITIAL.

        APPEND VALUE #( %tky     = ls_voo-%key
              %msg     = new_message_with_text(
              severity = if_abap_behv_message=>severity-error
              text     = lv_msg_error
           ) ) TO reported-marcacaovoo.

      ELSE.

        SELECT bookid
            FROM sbook
            INTO lv_bookid
            WHERE carrid = ls_sbook-carrid
            AND   connid = ls_sbook-connid
            AND   fldate = ls_sbook-fldate
            AND   customid = ls_sbook-customid
            AND   class = ls_sbook-class
            AND   order_date = sy-datum
            ORDER BY bookid ASCENDING.
        ENDSELECT.

        APPEND VALUE #( %msg = new_message( id = '00'
                  number = '398'
                  v1 = |Marcação de Vôo { lv_bookid } criada!|
                  severity =
                  if_abap_behv_message=>severity-success )
                  %key-carrid = ls_voo-carrid
                  %key-connid = ls_voo-connid
                  %key-fldate = ls_voo-fldate
                  %key-bookid = lv_bookid
                  %key-customid = ls_voo-customid
                  carrid = ls_voo-carrid
                  connid = ls_voo-connid
                  fldate = ls_voo-fldate
                  bookid = lv_bookid
                  customid = ls_voo-customid

                   )
                  TO reported-marcacaovoo.

      ENDIF.

    ENDIF.

  ENDMETHOD.

When successful, it continues on the Object Page screen but only with the data I entered on the screen.

When you go back to the List Report and select the created line again, it comes with the correct data.

Only after creation does it not bring the data back.

Has anyone gone through something similar?

entry.title: Re: Manage dates-driven planning processes with SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Thomas, thank you for this detailed information! 

I have a question on whether SAC is able to calculate the date based on the input project days?

A use case is: there's a start date of the project and the user will key in the estimated project days. Is SAC able to calculate the end date?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: ALSM_EXCEL_TO_INTERNAL_TABLE hangs
entry.content:
Solution Is How many required ROws u have to pass only those number in ROWS..If it is more it runs that many times.    

CALL FUNCTION 'ALSM_EXCEL_TO_INTERNAL_TABLE'
      EXPORTING
        filename                = lv_filename
        i_begin_col             = 1
        i_begin_row             = 2
        i_end_col               = 17
        i_end_row               = 2000

entry.title: Re: System Creating Reservation instead of PO
entry.content: Thanks Ken for detailed explanation and help. Much appreciated.

entry.title: Re: How to tackle Quality Issues after UD?
entry.content: Thanks Angelo for your input,

entry.title: Re: How to tackle Quality Issues after UD?
entry.content: Thanks Angelo for your input, However I cannot use 08 inspection type as here is it mapped for Plant to plant material transfer (Quality is deactivated at Sloc to Sloc transfer within same plant). So I guess best way forward is Manual inspection lot.

entry.title: SAP PS - How to add new option as a PR for Network >> Material Assignment
entry.content:
Hello All Gurus, 

Client wants to add new option here as new PR type as a custom option - say 

3rd Radio Button as - ZENO Purch Requisition 

I have searched many threads here but didn't find anything much fruitful. 

Can someone please let me know how do I configure this ? What are the steps (t.code) for these settings to add new option as 3rd radio button ? 

Your help would be very much appreciated. 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Regards,

Tanuj.

entry.title: Re: From User Exits to RAP: Adopting a Clean Core Approach in S/4HANA

How to handle case when sales order is locked and we are not eable to update sales order in moment of event triggering?

entry.title: Re: Work flow question: How to find who holds a work flow?
entry.content: Hi Keohanster, For some reason, what I can do here is to to make comments. Not able to reply nor adding screendumps. I will try my personal laptop. one more thing: work flow is sent to HR's organization which covers multi users. Thank you so much.

entry.title: Re: SAP PaPM Cloud with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi,

SAP PaPM Cloud uses a separate HANA Cloud or Datasphere. Beside all the data integration capabilities these data platforms provide, you can also use SAP PaPM Cloud Remote Function Adapters, OData Connection and SOAP Connection capabilities to integrate both solutions.

 

Best regards,

Guenther

entry.title: Re: CIG support team does not provide support integration...
entry.content: did you find a solution to this issue ?

entry.title: Confirm Production Operation -Material Movements not listed all-
entry.content:
Hello Members,

I am having trouble resolving the issue in the title.

It is the component backflush setup.
Confirm Production Operation（F3069）does not list all components of the goods movement.
Check Production Order: Inventory Movement (CO11N) lists all components of the inventory movement.

Have you ever encountered a similar issue?
If so, how did you solve it?

I would be grateful if you could help me.
Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Unable to use the Newer Version of uploader FI - Bank Account Balance
entry.content:
Dear Expert 


The FI - Bank Account Balance uploader is deprecated now & its showing that New Version is available. However when I am clicking on it ,  there is a message which is showing Please use App "Manage Memo Records 2.0". In the Manage Memo Records 2.0 App , when I am clicking on create , two fields are PERSON_NAME , Company Code and Memo Record Type . What should we give in Memo Record Type ? please guide.


This is a very important point.Please provide us with a solution ASAP.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Unable to use the Newer Version of uploader FI - Bank...
entry.content:
Dear Sarvjeet,

 

For details regarding app Manage Memo Records 2.0, kindly refer to the SAP Help Portal Manage Memo Records 2.0

For further details about the fields and steps to create memo record, you can refer to the test script of scope item BFB (Basic Cash Operations) that I have also attached to the case.

entry.title: Re: Error returning creation data in RAP managed with save unmanaged
entry.content: WAIT UP TO 1 SECONDS may not be sufficient. Does it work with 10 seconds?

entry.title: how to connect a SAP Ariba Network Business portal to SAP Build work Zone
entry.content: I have the SAP Build Work Zone and I like to add the SAP Ariba Network (with option for authentication with userid and password).  I tried adding it as a URL app, but it does not giving option to sign in and gives a blank screen when clicking the tile.

entry.title: Re: CDS Analytical Projection Views - the new Analytical Query Model
entry.content:
@AndreaUS 

We are showing the Billing Document details in a custom application. This application shows Billing Document details. One of the field is from the long text (from the billing item text ids). This information is not directly available from the table but only available using the function module 'READ_TEXT'.

For the column we have used virtual elements but since the analytical queries are not supporting we are looking for the options to show the data.

entry.title: Re: Mass programmatic deployment of Fiori Elements applications on S/4HANA 2021 On-Premise
entry.content: It's up to the user to decide of the number of applications, it can be 10 or 150 apps(RAP BO), there will be UI5 app where they will defined a table definition and out of it we will use XCO to generate RAP BO with Fiori Elements annotations. Now the question is how to access the generated Fiori Elements application (RAP BO) from the UI5 app, how to depoly the generated FE app and later redirect user to FE app from UI5 app. We have XCO generator for RAP BO, but how we looking to have "deployment generator".

entry.title: Re: First steps to work with SAP Cloud ALM Deployment scenario for SAP ABAP systems (7.40 or higher)
entry.content:
Thanks Jorge!! really appreciated!

Hi Neni, as we checked together the error "For the tenants assigned to your project via system group, the configuration in your managed system is missing. Please consult the Setup and Administration guide for SAP Cloud ALM"  was due to fact that there was a system included in the system group that was not "ready" for using in Deployment according to section 3. Setup on the Managed Systems indications.

entry.title: Can we change activity quantity after settlement?
entry.content:
There are some orders were settlement on last month without final confirmation and input activity quantity.

So is it possible to update activity quantity of those orders in this month and do the final confirmation?

entry.title: Re: Addon Connection Timeout in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi SatyaDeo,

Can you make sure that the add-on is packaged correctly and using all the DLLs from the same version and patch?

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: 🧰👷‍♂️ The SAP S/4HANA RISE & SAP BTP - Toolbox 👷‍♂️🧰
entry.content:
Ok, I'm having trouble to edit the Toolbox as it is reaching the limits of how big a blog can be, sooooo time for creative thinking... we'll use the comments, because the biggest value of this work is it is 1 page and therefore searchable with CTRL-F:

SAP Analytics and Reporting Continued....

The big news this week is the launch of SAP Business Data Cloud. What I love about this product is it includes Databricks and Datalake storage all under the SAP umbrella and what this means for people like me is we don't need to work with the Enterprise Big Data and Analytics Teams in the context of SAP big data, because we can use our Local Technology Standard SAP Business Data Cloud under our SAP footprint umbrella of Technology Standards. The consequence of this is, we will become much faster, because in my experience, in the some companies, as soon as we need to work with other Organisations in the Enterprise things can become slower. This means SAP are improving our agility and accelerating us to bring value to the Enterprise.

The good news is, SAP DataSphere Customers automatically roll-over to the SAP Business Data Cloud as Customers.

So, the Toolbox, there are already SAP Learning Journeys for SAP Business Data Cloud:

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/introducing-sap-business-data-cloud

https://learning.sap.com/courses/introducing-sap-business-data-cloud/positioning-sap-business-data-cloud

entry.title: Re: 🧰👷‍♂️ The SAP S/4HANA RISE & SAP BTP - Toolbox 👷‍♂️🧰
entry.content:
SAP RISE Security Continued....

SAP Enterprise Cloud Services have a Cloud Application Service for SAP ECS Advanced Security and Compliance

The Service description makes very useful reading:

https://assets.cdn.sap.com/agreements/product-policy/hec/service-description/sap-cloud-application-services---advanced-security-and-compliance-english-v8-2024a.pdf

entry.title: Re: DATA migration

Best regards,

Irene

entry.title: Re: QTD functionality on Group Financial Statements Review Booklet app

entry.title: Re: 🚨 SAP Build Apps – Access Denied (403 Forbidden) – S...
entry.content: Same issue for many including me . No solution from SAP Yet.

entry.title: Re: Schedule OverView (Capacity Planning) Reddening, even though there is no overlap
entry.content: Hi SI_y_Ito, Could you please provide the application name (or the ID by clicking the user name icon in upper right), then I will help you on finding the responsible expert on your question. Thanks and regards, Irene

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite – Access Policies for Integration Packages
entry.content:
Thanks a lot for the detailed description, but I have some comments/questions:

Which parts of a package are protected by the policy? Can I see all the artifacts of a package ID but cannot view the payloads, for example? To explain, I have created a policy in which a specific package ID is assigned. My expectation would now be that I can only see the parts in the various sections (Monitor->Manage Integration Content etc.) for which I am authorized. Currently, however, I am able to see all content of the Integration Content, only access to the payloads is denied. Am I doing something wrong? Greetings Jurand

entry.title: Re: Work Agreement API in S/4 HANA Public Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi @eithazinhtwe 

We have some CDS views available for work agreements including manager external ID and cost center. Could you please check if I_WorkAssignmentDetail meets your requirement? Here is the documentation for the same. Also all of the CDS views regarding Human resources can be found here.

Best regards,
Irene

entry.title: Re: Work Agreement API in S/4 HANA Public Cloud Edition
entry.content: Hi Ei, kindly add tag "SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Human Resources" and remove the generic one for getting the answers quicker. For tags, you may check https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/q-amp-a-for-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-how-to-get-your-answer-faster/ba-p/13934481.

entry.title: Re: Based on my available Raw Material, I wish to know ho...
entry.content:
Hi @Privete_member__995900,

Check the Supply Based creation Based confirmation in Aatp.
This will satisfy your requirement, which will check the current Inventory stock of the raw material and do the confirmation.
Check the below SAP docs
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/f132c385e0234fe68ae9ff35b2da178c/b055b463a31f45a58a9d60bebd2495c6.html

Hope this helps!!!

Best Regards,
Surya.

entry.title: How to Reduce Import Time for 1M Records in SAP Customer Data Cloud Dataflow?
entry.content:
I am using SAP Customer Data Cloud Dataflow to import user accounts into the system (site). However, the import process for 1 million records takes around 20 hours. I am looking for ways to optimize and reduce the import time.

Are there any best practices, configurations, or parallel processing techniques that can help improve performance? Any guidance or recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Batch Determination of components in the Production Order in S/4 1709
entry.content:
Hi Nansy,
Thanks A Lot, for sharing the Kind feedback
Best Regards: Raja

entry.title: Re: Badges are not showing
entry.content: Thanks , Sure i will recheck it

entry.title: Re: Not possible to enter services ("final entry" indicator set)
entry.content: kindly tell me where you see delivery complete indicator in service Po and How we can set DCI

entry.title: SAC User Attribute Mapping
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I understand there are multiple ways to create users in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC):

1. Dynamic User Creation and

2. Provisioning via IPS.

Which method is generally recommended, and under what cases?

Similarly, for assigning user attributes, there are two options:

1. SAML Attribute Mapping and

2. IPS Transformation.

"targetPath": "$['urn:sap:params:scim:schemas:extension:sac:2.0:group-roles']['roles'][1]['value']",
"condition": "$.displayName == 'group'",
"constant": "PROFILE:sap.epm:Admin",

Which method is recommended, and when should each method be used?

 

Many thanks

entry.title: Re: Service Call Status History for KPI reporting
entry.content:
Hi,

You can refer this for the same

https://forum.sapb1.vn/community/systemtools/cau-truy-van-service-call-voi-cac-tham-so-theo-trang-thai-va-khoang-ngay/

Hope this helps,

SonTran

entry.title: Re: #ABAP_Trial Docker image fails to start HDB
entry.content:
Hi IanMacLaren, Hope you are really doing Good and Great. This error I got several times and presently it is coming very very very rare. after executing the following commands step by step in sequence it is mentioned below. Just after starting the Docker Desktop ONLY, NOT after starting sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial:ABAPTRIAL_2022_SP01: -

Following is the sequence as mentioned: -

1. start Windows OS

 

2. ONLY One time remember to change value: - in the .wslconfig file I needed to add more memory  memory=28GB

3. Start Docker Desktop ONLY

 

4. This command to be executed one time ONLY remember. Then execute the following command from Windows PowerShell (run as Administration) prompt.

docker run -d --sysctl kernel.shmmax=21474836480 --sysctl kernel.shmmni=32768 --sysctl kernel.shmall=5242880 --sysctl kernel.msgmni=1024 --sysctl kernel.sem="1250 256000 100 8192" --ulimit nofile=1048576:1048576 --name a4h -it sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial:ABAPTRIAL_2022_SP01

5. Then execute this command to start the Docker SAP instance:

docker start -ai a4h_2022_20240421

6. Then login into the SAPGui and schedule SGEN in background. This will not take huge time but still 15 to 25 min.

After this you must see the following paragraph: -

************************************************************************************

Worker Processes: started, pid=xxxxx

*** All services have been started. ***
***
*** To stop and be able to safely start again use Ctrl-C
*** Or use the stop command with timeout: docker stop -t 7200 ...
***
*** Have fun! ***

***********************************************************************************

Hope this will help.

Thanks & Regards

Kushal Sambhunath Banerjee

entry.title: Manual Bank Statement not completed
entry.content:
Hi Expert 

We have tried to post manual bank statement by "Manage Bank Statement APP", but the system not posting the same also not gives any error. Hence, Statement Status showing "Not Completed".

Kindly help to resolve the same on top priority. Because our UAT testing is hamper.

House Bank AXI52 

Statement No.  1

CB USER is       CB9980000022

Thanks,

Vinay

entry.title: Re: SAC User Attribute Mapping
entry.content: Using both. The first for always accurate Authorizations upon login, the second to clean up users

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi @leon3 , hi @Kushal_Banerjee , 

the password for hana is the same as for developer user

thank you @rileyrainey

entry.title: ThePicklr Denton
entry.content:
Hello Dallas SAP community!

today is opening day at The Picklr Denton. There is open play between 11-5 (first come first serve) 

come out and say hello / check it out. Perfect for a shiny / rainy (like today) day

entry.title: Re: [BTP Build Work Zone] Facing error in console after d...
entry.content: I am facing the same issue in manifest its not starting in "/"

entry.title: Bulk data upload in custom business configuration app
entry.content: How can we insert data from a excel file to the TMG created in Custom Business Configuration fiori app?I am maintaining data manually but there is requirement to maintain bulk of data at once from the excel file?

entry.title: [BTP Workzone] Metadata not found 404
entry.content:
Hello,

i am facing an issue where i have created a full stack app using CAP framework using this tutorial https://developers.sap.com/mission.hana-cloud-cap.html , tested everything working fine in BAS and also continuing to that i managed to deploy it CF following this https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-deploy-mta.html , everything is working as excepted & i am able to test the app using app router with necessary authentication also.

But when i try to use the app in workzone, i just did "cds add workzone" where its added the html5 repo,destinations,,, features. I am able to integrate/add the app into workzone site and when i try to launch the app from workzone tile its not launching the app or its giving 404 error while loading the metadata.

Any help would be highly appreciated. 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Split valuation - standard cost estimate CK11N
entry.content:
Hi OzkanCO,

Did you try using mixed costing?

It is important to edit the procurement alternative for the material, and define their mixing ratios.

In this way it should be possible to standard cost both valuation types by saving one for the header (mixed), one for production and one for the external valuated.  

Afterwards the system should be able to differentiate each valuation type: for material purchases the valuation type is external; for production orders the valuation type is in-house. Price differences as well should be differentiated the same way.

entry.title: Re: Eclipse(HANA Development): Error when searching for a...
entry.content: this did not work, I am getting the same error with both versions

entry.title: Re: Eclipse(HANA Development): Error when searching for a...
entry.content: I used 202409 and faced the same issue

It would be more helpful

Thanks in advance 
Shiva

entry.title: Re: SAP PaPM Cloud with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Additionally, please refer to this blog post to get more information: https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-blogs-by-sap/sap-profitability-and-performance-management-cloud-subscription-with-byod/ba-p/13995981

entry.title: Re: Brownfield Conversion from EHS Product Safety (ECC) t...
entry.content:
Hello

regarding your topic as:

 

  • CG02 specification (realsub and so on)
  • Material Master
  • WWI Template 
  • generated SDS raw WWI reports
  • SDS shipment history (CVD1)
  • Customer master data (SDS receiver)

During the S/4 Brownfield Conversion, how would the data cleansing activities look like?

  • Will the data be copied during the ECC-to-S4-Conversion and obsolete EHS data can be filtered out with transition tools?
  • Or is the only way to do clean up by having an empty S4 system and data need to be manually migrated into the S4 system after cleanup?
  • Or do we delete data in the source system by setting deletion marks? So that during the data copy of the ECC-to-S4-Conversion only validated data will be taken over?

 

As mentioned: the "exact process depends on mand things. In your list i would miss "phrases".

Anyhow: based on your story:

You have an "old" landscatp and you would to use a new landscape

There;

  • Will the data be copied during the ECC-to-S4-Conversion and obsolete EHS data can be filtered out with transition tools? 

I am sorry: there is no transition tool

Option one: extract the data via "export" and do "import" in the new system. THIS IS ONLY POSSIBLE IF SET UP IS IDENTICAL

And this is the problem.. in most of the case you would like to ge rid of "useless" data etc.

I am sorry: here we do not have any SAP tool which "really" helps (i skip some suboptions)

Regarding:

  • Or is the only way to do clean up by having an empty S4 system and data need to be manually migrated into the S4 system after cleanup?

As i have understood: you will start with an "empty" system: so yes you must migrate (i will not call this "full" manual; but many steps are "afterwork" steps

Regarding:

  • Or do we delete data in the source system by setting deletion marks? So that during the data copy of the ECC-to-S4-Conversion only validated data will be taken over?

This helsp to get rid of "unneeded" data before data migration; but still you need to move the data

As mentioned: i am sorry: the exact (may be best approch) depends on many factors

Luckily: Of you just "google": many companies can help fo EHS data migration

I wish you the best

C.B

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to use SVT classic along with the rest...
entry.content:
Hello

best knowledge on my side: you should not activate the "marketibility" part of PC to avoid risks to use EHS SVT classic.

But for detaisl: the best option is always to ask SAP to get guidance.

SC.B.

entry.title: Re: Bulk data upload in custom business configuration app
entry.content:
did you enable the copy&paste?

they also support excel upload.

entry.title: Change Table cell value without Planning
entry.content:
Hi All,

Can someone please suggest me on the below requirement.

Can i populate the value of a table cell in SAP Analytics Cloud? We are not using Planning and also we are using live model, so can't do calculations at model level.

We have requirement to populate the percentage values based on few existing dimension values, i can loop through the existing values in table and can calculate percentage values using script, can i populate the table cell values using the calculated values in backend using script 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: what does "fra3" in the FQDN stand for?
entry.content:
Hi,
Thanks for you answer but can we please get an assured/undoubtedly answer instead of suspicions/presumptions? 
And maybe a table declaring the different naming conventions?  That would help out customers & partners while troubleshooting. 
Thank you! Steven.

entry.title: Re: multiapps exception while deploying CAP Node.js appli...
entry.content:
Exception caught#
org.cloudfoundry.multiapps.common.SLException: A step of the process has failed. Retrying it may solve the issue.
  at org.cloudfoundry.multiapps.controller.process.steps.SyncFlowableStep.executeInternal(SyncFlowableStep.java:78) ~[multiapps-controller-process-1.183.0.jar:?]
  at org.cloudfoundry.multiapps.controller.process.steps.SyncFlowableStep.lambda$execute$0(SyncFlowableStep.java:66) ~[multiapps-controller-process-1.183.0.jar:?]
  at org.cloudfoundry.multiapps.controller.core.util.LoggingUtil.logWithCorrelationId(LoggingUtil.java:14) ~[multiapps-controller-core-1.183.0.jar:?]
  at org.cloudfoundry.multiapps.controller.process.steps.SyncFlowableStep.execute(SyncFlowableStep.java:66) ~[multiapps-controller-process-1.183.0.jar:?]
  at org.flowable.engine.impl.delegate.invocation.JavaDelegateInvocation.invoke(JavaDelegateInvocation.java:35) ~[flowable-engine-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at org.flowable.engine.impl.delegate.invocation.DelegateInvocation.proceed(DelegateInvocation.java:32) ~[flowable-engine-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at org.flowable.engine.impl.delegate.invocation.DefaultDelegateInterceptor.handleInvocation(DefaultDelegateInterceptor.java:26) ~[flowable-engine-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at org.flowable.engine.impl.bpmn.behavior.ServiceTaskDelegateExpressionActivityBehavior.execute(ServiceTaskDelegateExpressionActivityBehavior.java:161) ~[flowable-engine-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at org.flowable.engine.impl.agenda.ContinueProcessOperation.executeActivityBehavior(ContinueProcessOperation.java:298) ~[flowable-engine-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at org.flowable.engine.impl.agenda.ContinueProcessOperation.executeSynchronous(ContinueProcessOperation.java:175) ~[flowable-engine-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at org.flowable.engine.impl.agenda.ContinueProcessOperation.continueThroughFlowNode(ContinueProcessOperation.java:125) ~[flowable-engine-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at org.flowable.engine.impl.agenda.ContinueProcessOperation.run(ContinueProcessOperation.java:88) ~[flowable-engine-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at org.flowable.common.engine.impl.AbstractEngineConfiguration.lambda$new$0(AbstractEngineConfiguration.java:195) ~[flowable-engine-common-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at org.flowable.engine.impl.interceptor.CommandInvoker.executeOperation(CommandInvoker.java:130) ~[flowable-engine-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at org.flowable.engine.impl.interceptor.CommandInvoker.executeOperations(CommandInvoker.java:114) ~[flowable-engine-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at org.flowable.engine.impl.interceptor.CommandInvoker.execute(CommandInvoker.java:72) ~[flowable-engine-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at org.flowable.engine.impl.interceptor.BpmnOverrideContextInterceptor.execute(BpmnOverrideContextInterceptor.java:26) ~[flowable-engine-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at org.flowable.common.engine.impl.interceptor.TransactionContextInterceptor.execute(TransactionContextInterceptor.java:53) ~[flowable-engine-common-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at org.flowable.common.engine.impl.interceptor.CommandContextInterceptor.execute(CommandContextInterceptor.java:105) ~[flowable-engine-common-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at org.flowable.common.spring.SpringTransactionInterceptor.lambda$execute$0(SpringTransactionInterceptor.java:57) ~[flowable-spring-common-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at org.springframework.transaction.support.TransactionTemplate.execute(TransactionTemplate.java:140) [spring-tx-6.2.0.jar:6.2.0]
  at org.flowable.common.spring.SpringTransactionInterceptor.execute(SpringTransactionInterceptor.java:57) [flowable-spring-common-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at org.flowable.common.engine.impl.interceptor.LogInterceptor.execute(LogInterceptor.java:30) [flowable-engine-common-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at org.flowable.common.engine.impl.cfg.CommandExecutorImpl.execute(CommandExecutorImpl.java:56) [flowable-engine-common-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at org.flowable.common.engine.impl.cfg.CommandExecutorImpl.execute(CommandExecutorImpl.java:51) [flowable-engine-common-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at org.flowable.job.service.impl.asyncexecutor.ExecuteAsyncRunnable.executeJob(ExecuteAsyncRunnable.java:127) [flowable-job-service-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at org.flowable.job.service.impl.asyncexecutor.ExecuteAsyncRunnable.run(ExecuteAsyncRunnable.java:115) [flowable-job-service-6.8.0.jar:6.8.0]
  at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1136) [?:?]
  at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:635) [?:?]
  at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:840) [?:?]
 
 
 
 
This is the error i am getting please help

entry.title: How to auto generate DME file in AL11 from F100
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP S4 Hana Private Cloud system, the requirement is to generate DME file in AL11 directory once the payment has been processed from F110 automatically. User should only run F110, and the file should be sent to bank automatically.

Currently to place the DME file in AL11, we need to run FBPM with the selected variant then only system is placing the file in the directory.

How to achieve this in SAP?

Regards,
Tanya

entry.title: Re: Bulk data upload in custom business configuration app
entry.content: yes, I am able to copy entries from excel doc and paste it here.Is there any other way

entry.title: Re: Bulk data upload in custom business configuration app
entry.content: there is another standard app for you to do upload.

entry.title: Re: HTTP 403 Forbidden error when posting a https url from postman to CPI
entry.content: Hi pushpalata , I suggest you to close the entire session. Login again and check now. Also disable the CSRF Protected Checkbox

entry.title: Is it possible to configure the order of the columns in the calibration export?
entry.content: We have included all of the fields we want on the report and the added fields appear in alphabetical order. We would like to order them ourselves.

entry.title: Re: Setting up the configuration of the ABAP Cloud in SAP Build
entry.content:
Hello @Nesreen!

I've followed the steps in the SAP BTP trial enviroment but when I'm selecting the created destination in the system dropdown, a message is raised:

Is there any additional configuration I have to do?

Also it is not possible to access the file in the step 4 item 2 to import the destination:

 

Thanks in advance!
